solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def greatestLetter(self, s: str) -> str:
        lower_set = set()
        upper_set = set()
        for ch in s:
            if ch.islower():
                lower_set.add(ch)
            else:
                upper_set.add(ch)
        common_letters = set(ch.upper() for ch in lower_set if ch.upper() in upper_set)
        return max(common_letters) if common_letters else ""
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution efficiently identifies letters that appear in both lowercase and uppercase by using sets for quick lookups. It then finds the greatest letter using the max function, ensuring optimal performance.
